overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game (Cyberpunk 2077), walking through a neon-lit urban street under an elevated highway at night. The player emerges from a dark area into a covered walkway with large digital billboards, passes futuristic sports cars, and traverses a pedestrian intersection with modern glass buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking out from behind a dark concrete wall into a lit underpass area with digital billboards visible ahead

large illuminated advertisement screen displaying a portrait on the left wall
red painted text on the concrete sidewalk indicating a pedestrian waiting area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark narrow space beside a concrete wall, then transitions into a covered urban walkway beneath an elevated highway. Neon lighting illuminates the scene as large digital billboards become visible on the left wall, and the camera moves forward along the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved sidewalk under overpass with vehicle traffic

events.description: camera turns right to follow the curved sidewalk alignment under the overpass
futuristic sports cars drive past on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: following the curve of the sidewalk under the overpass while observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car with sleek design driving along the curved road
red sports car following behind the black vehicle

entered.detail: sleek black vehicle with aerodynamic design and illuminated accents
low-profile red sports car with glowing headlights
modern building with curved glass facade and blue neon interior lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to follow a curved sidewalk beneath the overpass, where the digital billboard falls behind. Two futuristic sports cars drive past on the right, and a modern glass commercial building with blue neon lighting becomes visible ahead at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crossing area with commercial building entrance

pedestrian density increases to moderate as camera enters the crossing zone

agents.ego_description: walking through the pedestrian crossing area past the glass building alongside other pedestrians

entered.detail: vertical traffic light pole with illuminated signals near the crosswalk
yellow striped crosswalk lines painted on the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and walks through a pedestrian crossing area with moderate foot traffic. The glass commercial building moves from the distance to the left side as the camera passes it. The futuristic vehicles exit the frame behind, and the scene focuses on pedestrians crossing the neon-lit street under the persistent overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, confined alleyway into a vibrant, neon-lit urban intersection beneath an elevated highway. It begins in a narrow space beside a concrete wall before emerging into a covered walkway where large digital billboards illuminate the sidewalk. As the camera turns right to follow the curve of the overpass, the billboards recede and futuristic sports cars streak past on the right, revealing a modern glass commercial building glowing with blue neon ahead. The scene then opens into a bustling pedestrian crossing, where the glass building shifts to the left as the camera moves through a crowd of people crossing the street under the persistent shadow of the highway structure.
